attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WSCA.ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD,
WSCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       ,
WSCA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
WSCA.CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME      ,
WSCA.EDW_CREATE_DTM    ,
WSCA.EDW_CREATE_USER   ,
WSCA.EDW_UPDATE_DTM    ,
WSCA.EDW_UPDATE_USER   ,
WSCA.END_TV_DTM        ,
WSCA.MANUAL_TRX_KEY    ,
WSCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT          ,
WSCA.SALES_REP_NUM     ,
WSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
WSCA.SCASA_CREATION_DT ,
WSCA.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT  ,
WSCA.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY   ,
WSCA.SS_CD ,
WSCA.START_TV_DTM,
WSCA.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD, 
WSCA.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG,             
WSCA.ROLLUP_FLG,                    
WSCA.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG,  
WSCA.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,         
WSCA.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
WSCA.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,  
WSCA.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
WSCA.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
WSCA.SK_SC_ID_INT,
WSCA.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
WSCA.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
WSCA.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG,
WSCA.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,
WSCA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
WSCA.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
WSCA.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
WSCA.SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM,
WSCA.SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT,
WSCA.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
WSCA.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
WSCA.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM 
$$WORKDB.W_SLS_CR_ASGN_REBOK_MNL_ADJ WSCA
WHERE 
WSCA.DML_TYPE= 'I'
AND NOT  EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_CR_ASGN_REBOK_MNL_ADJ_TV NSCA
WHERE WSCA.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY =  NSCA.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY)

SELECT	RMNL_ADJ.ASSIGNMENT_MODE_CD, RMNL_ADJ.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
		RMNL_ADJ.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD, RMNL_ADJ.CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
		RMNL_ADJ.EDW_CREATE_DTM, RMNL_ADJ.EDW_CREATE_USER, RMNL_ADJ.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		RMNL_ADJ.EDW_UPDATE_USER, RMNL_ADJ.MANUAL_TRX_KEY, RMNL_ADJ.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
		RMNL_ADJ.SALES_REP_NUM, RMNL_ADJ.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, RMNL_ADJ.SCASA_CREATION_DT,
		RMNL_ADJ.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT, RMNL_ADJ.SLS_CR_ASSGN_MANUAL_ADJ_KEY,
		RMNL_ADJ.SS_CD, RMNL_ADJ.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMNT_REASON_CD, RMNL_ADJ.REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG,
		RMNL_ADJ.ROLLUP_FLG, RMNL_ADJ.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG, RMNL_ADJ.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD,
		RMNL_ADJ.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT, RMNL_ADJ.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME,
		RMNL_ADJ.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD, RMNL_ADJ.PD_SLS_CREDIT_LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
		RMNL_ADJ.SK_SC_ID_INT, RMNL_ADJ.LAST_UPDATED_DTM	, RMNL_ADJ.DV_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
		RMNL_ADJ.SALES_CREDIT_DUPLICATE_FLG, RMNL_ADJ.LATEST_SALES_CREDIT_FLG,
		RMNL_ADJ.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG, RMNL_ADJ.TRX_VERSION_CHANGE_FLG,
		RMNL_ADJ.DISTRIBUTOR_BUCKET_FLG,
RMNL_ADJ.SRC_RPTD_SALES_REP_NUM,
RMNL_ADJ.SRC_RPTD_SHARE_NODE_ID_INT ,
RMNL_ADJ.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM,
RMNL_ADJ.EP_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT,
RMNL_ADJ.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM	$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SLS_CR_ASGN_REBOK_MNL_ADJ_TV RMNL_ADJ  
WHERE	END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
